title: eulophia ovalis var. ovalis
intro: Eulophia ovalis var. ovalis, also known as the Ovalis Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eulophia ovalis var. ovalis include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a treatment for wounds and ulcers. The herbal preparations of Eulophia ovalis var. ovalis include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
